faq.title: Everything you need
faq.subtitle: Direct answers to the questions CTOs and CEOs ask most before their first meeting with us.

items.question: How long does it take to deploy an AI agent to production?
items.answer: It depends on complexity. A standard Omnichannel agent (WhatsApp + Web Chat) takes between 2 and 4 weeks from kick-off to production, including CRM integration, RAG memory configuration, and adversarial QA testing under the Ouroboros Protocol. More complex projects with IoT integrations or Multi-Agent orchestration typically take between 6 and 12 weeks.

items.question: What differentiates Agentix Vanguard from a chatbot agency?
items.answer: Architecture. Chatbots are linear decision trees; our agents have persistent memory (RAG), multi-step reasoning, and the ability to autonomously execute actions in external systems (APIs, databases, IoT hardware). Additionally, the Ouroboros Protocol guarantees adversarial QA on every deployment, eliminating production errors.

items.question: Where is my data stored? Is it secure?
items.answer: We operate on dedicated infrastructure within your cloud of choice (GCP, AWS, Azure). All data in transit is protected with TLS 1.3 and at rest with AES-256. We work under VPC isolated architecture with zero-trust network segmentation. We are SOC 2 Ready, meaning our practices meet the most demanding enterprise security standards.

items.question: Does it work in Spanish and English?
items.answer: Yes. Our agents are natively multilingual. We use top-tier LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) with native understanding of 90+ languages. We also configure the agent's persona, tone, and vocabulary per language to guarantee brand consistency in each market.

items.question: How much does it cost to implement an Agentix Vanguard agent?
items.answer: Projects start with a free Architecture Audit where we assess your specific use case. From there, engagements range from modular implementations (a single channel or function) to full agentic platforms. Costs vary based on complexity, integrations, and interaction volume. Schedule your audit to get a tailored estimate for your business.

items.question: Can I use my own models, or does it have to be a third-party LLM?
items.answer: Completely flexible. We can deploy on foundation models from Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google, or integrate custom fine-tuned models deployed on Vertex AI, Amazon SageMaker, or Azure AI. The Ouroboros Protocol is model-agnostic by design, giving us resilience: if a provider raises prices or experiences downtime, the system automatically switches.

items.question: Why do we combine Vector RAG and GraphRAG (Neo4j) in our solutions?
items.answer: Vector RAG is excellent for fast retrieval over large unstructured documents. GraphRAG (Neo4j) adds relational intelligence, connecting entities, events, and causal dependencies that vector-only retrieval may miss. Hybrid RAG gives both speed and deep contextual reasoning.

items.question: How do you deploy agents on my IoT hardware (AWS/Azure) and what are Agentic Skills?
items.answer: We deploy through native edge stacks such as AWS IoT Greengrass and Azure IoT Edge, with MQTT streams for low-latency event processing. Agentic Skills are our proprietary modular runtime that executes governed actions across cloud and edge with deterministic behavior and enterprise controls.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.contact: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@agentixvanguard.com

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By accessing or using the Agentix Vanguard platform, website, APIs, and related services ("Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you are using the Services on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

sections.title: 2. Autonomy, Hybrid RAG and AI Hallucinations
paragraphs: Agentix Vanguard provides AI agents that execute autonomous workflows through proprietary Agentic Skills and Hybrid RAG (Vector retrieval plus GraphRAG). These systems are assistance tools, and the account operator remains responsible for validating outputs.

AI models may produce inaccurate, biased, or inappropriate outputs ("AI hallucinations"). For financial, safety-critical, or regulatory actions, Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) validation is required. Services are provided "as is" without warranties.

sections.title: 3. Hybrid Infrastructure and Third-Party Governance
paragraphs: Our Services may be deployed on AWS IoT Greengrass, Azure IoT Edge, and GCP environments, and may integrate with third-party APIs (Meta/WhatsApp, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). You must comply with all third-party terms. Violations can result in immediate revocation of access.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: Agentix Vanguard retains rights to platform technology, proprietary Agentic Skills runtime, and orchestration logic. Ownership of graph ontologies and telemetry data is allocated by customer agreement. You retain ownership of your uploaded data and grant us a limited processing license to operate the Services.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
paragraphs: You agree not to use the Services to generate spam, hate content, or engage in illegal activities. You will not use the Services in any way that violates the Acceptable Use policies of Meta, OpenAI, Anthropic, or other providers whose APIs we use. Violation of this section will result in immediate suspension or termination.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Agentix Vanguard shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid to us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.contact: To exercise your GDPR/CCPA rights (access, rectification, deletion, portability), contact us at privacy@agentixvanguard.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 1. Data We Collect
paragraphs: We collect: names, email addresses, IP addresses, device information, and conversation logs (inputs and outputs from AI agents). We also collect technical data such as timestamps, usage patterns, and logs necessary for service operation and abuse prevention.

sections.title: 2. Third-Party Processors (Sub-processors)
paragraphs: Your data may be processed by infrastructure and AI providers. We use: AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud for hosting; OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google (Vertex AI) for language models. Data sent via API to these providers is not used for model training under our enterprise agreements. Below is a summary of key sub-processors:

sections.title: 3. Edge AI, Graph Memory and On-Device Processing
paragraphs: For Edge Pro deployments, critical telemetry may be processed locally on-device or through edge runtimes (e.g., AWS IoT Greengrass). Hybrid graph representations can be pseudonymized and synchronized with cloud services only when operationally required.

sections.title: 4. Your Rights (GDPR / CCPA)
paragraphs: Regardless of your location, you have the right to: access your personal data, request rectification, request deletion, request data portability, and object to processing. If you are in the EU/EEA or California, these rights apply under GDPR and CCPA. Contact us at privacy@agentixvanguard.com to exercise these rights. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
paragraphs: AI provider logs are typically retained for 30 days for abuse detection. We retain your account and usage data as necessary to provide the Services and comply with legal obligations. Enterprise customers may request zero-data-retention options where available.
